entries.title: Memory architecture
entries.description: Layer 1: structured JSON in memory/structured/*.json (9 files, one per role). Layer 2: claude-mem MCP (1400+ observations). Layer 1 is fast-load, Layer 2 is search.

entries.title: Write protocol
entries.description: Roles write their OWN memory. MemM audits after. MemM is librarian, not gatekeeper. Cross-role propagation requires PM approval.

entries.title: Memory health check
entries.description: MemM verifies: no duplicates across files, no contradictions with CLAUDE.md, entries are current (not stale).

entries.title: Initial Layer 1 creation
entries.description: All 9 structured memory files created 2026-03-04. Previously described in MEMORY.md but never materialized.

entries.title: Catalog alignment: installs field + unified priority
entries.description: New field 'installs' added to 4,801 agent skills. SM, SecM, PM memories updated with dual catalog knowledge. Total entries now across all roles.

entries.title: Batch 11: first agent-only verification run
entries.description: Batch 11 verified 100 agent skills (skill_type=agent_skill) exclusively. SM gained --type filter in sm_select_targets.py to isolate agent vs MCP skills. SecM and SM memory evolving to handle agent skill security profile differences (text-injection risk vs code-execution risk).

entries.title: PM full memory audit — 2026-03-05
entries.description: PM conducted full audit of all 9 structured memory files. Findings: total_entries corrected from 63 to 65 (vm had 19, secm had 18 — both undercounted). evolve_cycles updated to 11. S-tier 100% milestone reached. Total verified: 4,475 (up from prior snapshots). All 9 files healthy, no contradictions with CLAUDE.md.
